agb.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for purchasing transcriptions from MormorsBreve.
agb.noticeText: This text is a preliminary template and does not constitute legal advice. Fields marked with […] must be filled in with the company's actual details, and the entire text should be reviewed by a Danish lawyer or accountant before the page goes live.
agb.s1Body: These terms and conditions apply to purchases on mormorsbreve.dk, operated by [Company name ApS], CVR […] ("we", "us"). By completing a purchase you accept the terms.
agb.s2Body: MormorsBreve is a digital service that uses AI to transcribe old handwriting (including Gothic script) into readable text. The first pages can be tried for free. After that you buy credits: 1 credit = 1 page. The AI result may contain errors and should be checked; for important purposes we offer an expert service.
agb.s3Body: All prices are in Danish kroner and include 25% VAT. Payment is made via Stripe (payment cards, MobilePay and others). The amount is charged when you buy credits. You receive a receipt/invoice by email.
agb.s4Body: The agreement is binding once you have completed the purchase and we have confirmed it by email. We do not keep the agreement text accessible to you beyond the confirmation sent.
agb.s5Body: As a consumer you generally have a 14-day right of withdrawal. However, for digital services delivered immediately, the right of withdrawal lapses once you have expressly consented to delivery beginning and acknowledged that the right of withdrawal is thereby lost. See further details on the page
agb.s6Body: The Danish Sale of Goods Act (Købeloven) applies to the purchase. If there is a defect in the service, you can file a complaint. Contact us at [kontakt@mormorsbreve.dk].
agb.s7Body: AI transcription is an aid and may contain errors. We are not liable for the consequences of using a transcription without your own checking, including for legal, financial or official purposes.
agb.s8BodyBefore: Complaints can be directed to us or to the Centre for Complaint Resolution of the Danish Competition and Consumer Authority (Konkurrence- og Forbrugerstyrelsen) via
agb.s9Body: The purchase is governed by Danish law.

blog.metaTitle: Blog – Sütterlin, Kurrent & old handwriting | MormorsBreve
blog.metaDescription: Tips and guides: learn to read Sütterlin, decipher old German script, digitise and transcribe handwriting. For genealogy and memories.
blog.intro: Guides and insights on Sütterlin, Kurrent and reading old handwriting – for everyone who wants to decipher grandma's letters and diaries.

blogPost.ctaText: Do you have letters or diaries in old German script or old handwriting? Try the transcription for free.

cta.placeholderSnippet:
Frankfurt, July 22, 1925

Dear Mother,

at last I find the time to write to you at length. The journey was long and arduous, yet here in the new apartment I already feel at home. The landlady is a warm-hearted woman, and the view from the window looks straight out onto the old market square with its fountain…

faq.ctaBody: Still have questions? Simply try MormorsBreve yourself — the first 3 pages are free.

landing.metaTitle: MormorsBreve – decipher Gothic script and old handwriting online
landing.metaDescription: Old letters, diaries and recipes in Gothic script? Upload a photo – and get readable text in minutes, for the whole family and for your genealogy research. The first pages are free. Translatable into over 30 languages.
landing.ogTitle: MormorsBreve – decipher Gothic script and old handwriting online
landing.ogDescription: Old letters, diaries and recipes in Gothic script? Upload a photo – and get readable text in minutes, for the whole family. The first pages are free.
landing.twitterDescription: Old letters, diaries and recipes in Gothic script? Upload a photo – and get readable text in minutes.
landing.heroImageAlt: Old diary with Gothic handwriting on a desk
landing.featureUploadDesc: Upload up to 20 photos, scans or a multi-page PDF at once. All pages are processed together – so the AI recognises the context better.
landing.featureVersionsDesc: True to the original, AI-completed and free interpretation: you choose how close to the original the text should be. Ideal for genealogy, family or gifts.
landing.featureEditDesc: Adjust all versions in the browser – fix typos, fill in gaps. Your changes are saved. Full control over the result.
landing.featureExportDesc: Beautiful PDF with a cover page to print and give away, image download per page or plain text file. Use the transcription however you like.
landing.featureMagnifierDesc: Hard-to-read passages? The built-in magnifier with adjustable zoom helps you compare the original and the transcription.
landing.featureTranslationDesc: Get the AI transcription in Danish — and have it translated right away into over 30 languages. Ideal when the family is spread across the world. Automatic, in the same step, at no extra cost.
landing.featureReadAloudDesc: Have transcriptions read aloud as an audio file with 6 different voices and 4 reading styles – a perfect gift for older family members who no longer see so well.
landing.step1Desc: Take photos or scan the pages – individually or as a multi-page PDF. Several pages at once are possible.
landing.step2Desc: You see the first 3 pages for free. Tip: the more pages you upload together, the more accurate the result.
landing.step3Desc: Done! You receive the readable text to read, print or pass on.
landing.heritageParagraph1: In many families there are handwritten treasures: grandparents' diaries, old letters from America, recipes or postcards. But almost no one can read the old Gothic handwriting today – and the same goes for church registers and censuses in your genealogy research.
landing.heritageParagraph2: MormorsBreve makes these memories accessible again – with AI in minutes, or for especially difficult script personally by experienced transcribers. For you, your children and grandchildren.
landing.familyMemoriesAlt: Older woman leafing through an old family diary with Gothic handwriting
landing.suetterlinCloseupAlt: Close-up of old Danish Gothic handwriting
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to decipher grandma's handwriting
landing.featuresSubtitle: So that family stories are not lost. Simple, personal and with respect for your memories.
landing.midCtaCuriousText: Curious? Try it with your own document.
landing.midCtaCuriousNote: 3 pages free – no sign-up, no credit card
landing.documentsFlatlayAlt: Old letters, documents and a family portrait on a wooden table
landing.scriptsTitle: Specialised in old Danish Gothic handwriting
landing.scriptsParagraph: Our AI is trained specifically on old Danish handwriting. It recognises the subtle differences between Gothic handwriting, transitional script, Gothic print (Fraktur) and modern handwriting.
landing.translationTitle: Family history knows no language barriers
landing.translationParagraph: Transcribe with MormorsBreve in Danish — and have it translated right away into English, French, Spanish or over 30 more languages. Included with every AI transcription, at no extra cost. So the whole family can read what was written — wherever they are in the world.
landing.translationNote: The automatic translation is part of the AI transcription (AI-Instant).
landing.translationOriginalSample: "Today was a beautiful day. The children played in the garden and grandmother brought cake."
landing.translationTranslatedSample: "Today was a beautiful day. The children played in the garden and grandmother brought cake."
landing.readAloudTitle: Make grandma's words audible — as a gift or for yourself
landing.readAloudParagraph: Children and grandchildren can generate and download the transcribed diaries and letters as an audio file – and give them to older family members who can no longer read well. Choose a voice and a reading style and hear how it sounds.
landing.readAloudFeature2: 4 reading styles: factual, audiobook, slow & clear, emotional
landing.readAloudFeature3: Listen right away and download as MP3
landing.readAloudNote: 1 page per 1,000 characters – available in the app after transcription.
landing.stepsSubtitle: No prior knowledge needed: upload a photo, view it for free, get the text.
landing.digitalTranscriptionAlt: Old Gothic handwriting being made readable on a tablet
landing.midCtaReadyNote: Result in minutes – the first 3 pages free
landing.serviceSplitTitle: AI transcription for most cases — experts for the rest
landing.serviceSplitSubtitle: Fast and affordable with AI – or with personal advice from our experts for especially difficult documents.
landing.aiServiceFast: Fast – result in a few minutes
landing.expertServiceAccuracy: Highest accuracy, even with hard-to-read documents
landing.pricingTitle: Pay only for what you need

pricing.heroSubtitle: AI reads your handwriting — ready in seconds. Choose your credit package:
pricing.aiCheckedReservation: Subject to review: We check whether the AI quality is sufficient for a correction.
pricing.testimonial1Text: At last I can read my grandmother's diaries. The AI even recognised the difficult Sütterlin script. A priceless gift for our family.
pricing.testimonial2Text: I was sceptical, but the quality won me over. The three text versions are brilliant – I can read both the original text and a modern version.
pricing.testimonial3Text: The read-aloud feature is wonderful. My mother can now hear her father's letters as an audiobook, even though she could never read his handwriting.
pricing.testimonial3Detail: Field post letters as a gift
pricing.legalIntro: By placing your order you accept our
pricing.benefitPdfIncluded: PDF for printing or gifting included
pricing.benefitSecurePayment: Secure payment, your data stays protected

privacy.metaDescription: How MormorsBreve processes your personal data – in accordance with the GDPR and the guidance of the Danish Data Protection Agency (Datatilsynet).
privacy.noticeBody: This text is a preliminary template and does not constitute legal advice. Fields marked with […] must be filled in with the company's actual details, and the entire text should be reviewed by a Danish lawyer or accountant before the page goes live.
privacy.controllerBody: [Company name ApS], CVR […], [address], is the data controller for the processing of the personal data we collect about you. Contact: [kontakt@mormorsbreve.dk].
privacy.dataBody: We process the data you provide to us (e.g. name and email at sign-up), the documents/images you upload for transcription, and technical data such as your IP address and use of the site.
privacy.purposeBody: We process the data to provide the transcription (performance of a contract, Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR), to comply with accounting and VAT rules (legal obligation, (c)), and – where you have given consent – for statistics and marketing ((a)).
privacy.aiBody: The images and documents you upload are processed to produce the transcription. Your documents are not used to train AI models. A sub-processor (AI provider) is used for the transcription itself; a data processing agreement has been concluded. [Specify the actual provider and server location.]
privacy.storageBody: We retain your data for as long as you have an account, and thereafter only for as long as necessary. Accounting records are kept for 5 years in accordance with the Danish Bookkeeping Act. You can have your data deleted at any time.
privacy.cookiesBody: We use cookies. Non-essential cookies (statistics and marketing) are only set with your prior, explicit consent, which you give granularly per category in our cookie banner. You can change or withdraw your consent at any time, just as easily as you gave it. This follows the cookie guidance of Datatilsynet and the Danish Agency for Digital Government.
privacy.rightsBody: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction and data portability, as well as the right to object. Contact us to exercise your rights.
privacy.complaintBodyBefore: You can lodge a complaint about our processing of your personal data with the Danish Data Protection Agency, Datatilsynet, Carl Jacobsens Vej 35, 2500 Valby,

widerruf.metaDescription: Information about the right of withdrawal at MormorsBreve – including the rules for instantly delivered digital services.
widerruf.noticeText: This text is a preliminary template and does not constitute legal advice. Fields marked with […] must be filled in with the company's actual details, and the entire text should be reviewed by a Danish lawyer or accountant before the page goes live.
widerruf.rightBody: As a consumer, you generally have a 14-day right of withdrawal from the day the agreement was concluded.
widerruf.instantTitle: Important regarding instant delivery of digital services
widerruf.instantBody: Our AI transcription is delivered immediately. When you ask to have the transcription carried out right away, we also ask you to expressly consent to delivery beginning before the withdrawal period expires, and to acknowledge that you thereby lose your right of withdrawal once the service has been fully delivered. This consent is given actively (a separate checkbox) before the transcription starts – not merely by accepting the terms and conditions.
widerruf.howToTitle: How to withdraw (when the right of withdrawal applies)
widerruf.howToBody: If you wish to withdraw from a purchase where delivery has not yet begun, you must notify us within 14 days by e-mail to [kontakt@mormorsbreve.dk] with an unequivocal statement that you are withdrawing. You may use the standard withdrawal form below, but this is not a requirement.
widerruf.refundBody: If you validly withdraw, we will refund the amount received without undue delay and no later than 14 days after we have received your notice, using the same means of payment as for the purchase.
widerruf.formDeclaration: I hereby give notice that I withdraw from my agreement for the following service: …

htRequest.title: Make a request
htRequest.accuracyReadingDesc: Readable text, gaps filled in sensibly. Ideal for family documents.
htRequest.accuracyScientificDesc: Character-faithful with uncertain passages marked. For research and editions.
htRequest.tierKiDesc: AI transcription with expert correction, 2–3 business days
htRequest.indicativePrice: Indicative price for {{pages}} pages: approx. {{total}} kr.
htRequest.eligibilityBody: AI-Checked requires that our AI can fundamentally read the text. Once we receive your request, we check whether the quality is sufficient. If it is suitable, we start straight away – otherwise we offer you the expert service. You take no risk.
htRequest.dataSharingBefore: To process your request, we forward your uploaded documents, transcription drafts and your notes to selected experts or partner companies and make them visible to them on the platform so they can submit a quote. All experts are contractually bound to confidentiality and to comply with the GDPR. You can find the details in our
htRequest.dataSharingAfter: . You can withdraw your consent at any time with effect for the future.
htRequest.consentDataSharing: I expressly consent to my uploaded documents, the transcription drafts created and my notes being shared with external experts and partner companies for the purpose of submitting a quote and processing, and being made visible to them on the platform.
htRequest.consentNoSensitiveData: I confirm that the uploaded documents do not contain any particularly sensitive data within the meaning of Art. 9 GDPR (e.g. health, religious, political or biometric data) of third parties, or that I am authorised to share this data.
htRequest.closingNote: We will find a suitable transcriber for your document and send you an individual quote. You then decide whether you want to accept it.
htRequest.toastSentBody: We will get back to you with an individual quote.

pdfExport.justifiedHint: Text is aligned to the full width (as in book printing).
pdfExport.footerTip: Tip: Use the preview to check the result before downloading.

preview.title: Preview
preview.subtitle: This is how well we could read the first page – and here is the text
preview.redirectingToResult: You will be taken to the result shortly.
preview.previewFailedBody: The preview could not be created. Please try again.
preview.languageToggleHint: Switch between German and the translation. The translation language was set when the preview was created.
preview.translationUnavailable: The translation could not be created. The translation service was unavailable.
preview.chooseTextVersionHint: Faithful to the original, completed, or interpreted by meaning.
preview.textAppearsHere: The text will appear here as soon as the preview is ready.
preview.ttsCreditsUsed: {{count}} credit used. Audio is being generated…
preview.ttsCreditsUsed_other: {{count}} credits used. Audio is being generated…
preview.tierInstantBody: All {{count}} pages as text – instantly from your balance.
preview.tierInstantCreditsNeeded: {{required}} credits still needed. Your balance: {{current}} credits
preview.tierCheckedBody: AI transcription with expert correction. Delivery time 2–3 business days.
preview.tierCheckedQualityRed: This document is extremely hard to read. AI-Verified may be limited.
preview.tierCheckedQualityYellow: After your request we check whether the AI quality is sufficient for a correction.
preview.tierCheckedQualityGreen: Good legibility detected. AI-Verified is suitable for this document.
preview.tierExpertBody: Complete human transcription. Delivery time 5–7 business days.
preview.resetDialogBody: Your edits for this text version will be discarded and the original AI transcription will be shown again. This step cannot be undone.

quality.levelRed: Very hard to read – the result may be limited
quality.readabilityQuestion: How readable is the source document?

result.errorImageFailed: The image could not be created.
result.ttsOverloadedBody: The service is currently overloaded. Please try again in a few minutes. Your balance has not been charged.
result.ttsAudioErrorBody: An error occurred while generating the audio. Your balance has not been charged. Please try again.
result.transcriptionFailedRetryBody: The transcription could not be created. Please try again.
result.transcriptionFailedBody: The transcription could not be created.
result.tipReadAloudBody: Have your transcription read aloud — with different voices, perfect as a gift for the family.
result.pagesEvaluatingBody: Your pages are now being processed.
result.pageRetryingBody: The page is being transcribed again.
result.resultPageImageSaved: Page {{n}} was saved as an image.
result.expertFinalVersion_one: {{count}} page · final version of the expert order
result.expertFinalVersion_other: {{count}} pages · final version of the expert order
result.saveAsImageTooltip: Download the result text as an image
result.lockedPageTitle: This page has not been processed yet
result.lockedPageBody: Get all pages as text – please choose “Make all pages readable now” below.
result.gapsFilled: Gaps have been filled in sensibly
result.interpretedNote: Text has been interpreted by meaning
result.noTextForPage: No text for this page yet.
result.title: Result
result.disclaimer: AI-generated transcription – may contain inaccuracies and is not suitable for legal or documentary purposes.
result.balanceSufficient: Sufficient balance – start the transcription now.
result.alternativeExpertBody: Only needed for extremely hard-to-read documents. We connect you with an experienced specialist.
result.cancelDialogBody: The transcription will stop immediately. Credit for pages not yet transcribed will be refunded to you automatically. Pages already finished are kept.
result.pagesFailedBodyOne: One page could not be transcribed. You can try again.
result.pagesFailedBodyMany: {{count}} pages could not be transcribed. You can retry them all at once.
result.ttsTeaserBody: 6 voices, 4 reading styles — perfect as a gift
result.creditExplanation: 1 credit = 1,000 characters read aloud (or 1 transcription page)
result.aiVerifiedBody: Have your transcription checked and corrected by experts. Delivery time 2–3 business days.
result.expertBody: Full human transcription by experienced specialists. Delivery time 5–7 business days.
result.resetDialogBody: Your edits for this text version will be discarded and the original AI transcription will be shown again. This step cannot be undone.

settings.invoiceLoadError: The invoice could not be loaded.
settings.invoicesEmpty: No invoices yet. Invoices are created automatically for page purchases and specialist orders.
settings.accountDeletedDescription: Your account has been permanently deleted.

settings.newsletterDescription: Receive tips and news about historical handwriting.
settings.newsletterOptIn: I would like to receive the newsletter
settings.invoicesDescription: Your invoices and completed payments. You can download invoices as PDF.
settings.dangerZoneDescription: If you delete your account, all your data will be permanently deleted: transcriptions, uploaded documents, support messages and payment information.
settings.deleteDialogDescription: This action cannot be undone. All your transcriptions, uploads and associated data will be permanently deleted.

specialistPaySuccess.invalidLinkBody: This page cannot be opened without a valid request ID.
specialistPaySuccess.timeoutTitle: Processing is taking longer than expected
specialistPaySuccess.timeoutBody: Your payment has been received by Stripe. In rare cases the confirmation can take a few minutes. Please check the status in your order overview.
specialistPaySuccess.processingBody: Please wait a moment, your payment is being verified.
specialistPaySuccess.errorBody: The payment could not be verified. Please contact support.
specialistPaySuccess.successBody: Thank you – your expert order has been confirmed.
specialistPaySuccess.processingNote: Our specialists are now starting work on your order. You will be notified as soon as the transcription is ready.

tourWelcome.title: Would you like a quick introduction?
tourWelcome.description: In about a minute we'll show you the most important features. You can restart the tour anytime via the question mark in the top right.

upload.invalidFormatDesc: Please select only photos (JPG, PNG) or PDF files.
upload.fileTooLargeDesc: Maximum file size per file: 50 MB. Too large: {{names}}
upload.maxSizeDesc: You can upload a maximum of 50 MB per transcription job. Please split your files across multiple transcription jobs.
upload.title: Upload pages
upload.subtitle: Upload all pages of your document at once – several photos, scans or a PDF with any number of pages. This helps the AI understand the context better.
upload.dropzoneTitle: Drag all pages here or click to select
upload.dropzoneHint: Photos (JPG, PNG) or PDF (multi-page too) – max. 50 MB total
upload.costFirstPagePrefix: Transcription of the first page costs
upload.moreCreditsNeeded: · More credits are needed for all {{count}} pages
upload.reorderHint: Adjust the order with the arrows – this is how the pages will be transcribed.
upload.morePagesInfo: Click the “+” on the right to add more pages. Several pages together produce a better transcription.

adminAnon.title: Anonymous analyses
adminAnon.subtitle: Documents uploaded via the free AI analysis (without login)

adminDashboard.toastSettingSaveFailed: The setting could not be saved
adminDashboard.loadErrorBody: Unknown error. Check whether you are signed in as an admin.
adminDashboard.ctaCardIntro: Clicking a tile changes the default variant (shown when rotation is off).
adminDashboard.ctaCardHotNote: Variants marked 🔥 replace the separate "Transcription preview" card and embed the CTA directly into the preview – less scrolling, a clearer next step.
adminDashboard.ctaRotationHint: When active, each new analysis is randomly assigned one of the variants marked below. When off, the most recently clicked default variant (V{{variant}}) applies.
adminDashboard.ctaNoVariantBody: As long as no variant is selected, the system falls back to the default variant (V{{variant}}). Mark at least two variants below as "In rotation".
adminDashboard.abTestNeedsTwoBody: For a real A/B test, at least two variants should be marked.
adminDashboard.ctaGroupClassic: Classic – CTA as a separate card below the preview
adminDashboard.ctaGroupIntegrated: 🔥 Integrated – preview + CTA in one card (less bouncing)
adminDashboard.ctaGroupSummaryOnly: 🧠 Summary only – no text excerpt (against free readers)
adminDashboard.transcriptionPreviewPrompt: Sign up for free to get the full transcription.
adminDashboard.ctaResetDialogBody: Sets impressions and claims of all variants to 0. The rotation settings (toggle and variant selection) are preserved. This step cannot be undone.
adminDashboard.heroCardIntro: Clicking a tile changes the default variant of the home page hero (shown when rotation is off). Impressions and uploads are counted (first funnel step: a visitor selects a file in the hero).
adminDashboard.heroRotationHint: When active, each new visitor is randomly assigned one of the variants marked below (sticky per session). When off, the most recently clicked default variant (V{{variant}}) applies.
adminDashboard.heroNoVariantBody: As long as no variant is selected, the system falls back to the default variant (V{{variant}}). Mark at least two variants below as "In rotation".
adminDashboard.heroResetDialogBody: Sets impressions and uploads of all hero variants to 0. The rotation settings (toggle and variant selection) are preserved. This step cannot be undone.
adminDashboard.noInvoicesYet: No invoices in the database yet.
adminDashboard.heatmapDescription: On which weekday and at what time (CET) did the users who actually bought something register?
adminDashboard.toastMessageSendFailed: The message could not be sent.
adminDashboard.userDataLoadError: User data could not be loaded.
adminDashboard.creditSetNotAdded: The existing balance is set directly to this value, not added to.
adminDashboard.resendSyncDescription: Synchronizes all users with newsletter opt-in and sign-up from the cutoff date into a Resend segment.
adminDashboard.resendSegmentIdPlaceholder: Leave empty if RESEND_MARKETING_SEGMENT_ID is set
adminDashboard.resendSegmentIdHint: Resend now calls audiences segments. You'll find the ID in the Resend dashboard next to the segment.
adminDashboard.resendSyncResultLine: {{eligible}} matching · {{created}} new · {{updated}} updated · {{added}} in segment · {{failed}} failed
adminDashboard.sendTemplateDialogDesc_one: {{count}} user selected. Sending is recorded in the marketing log and counts toward this user's 48h cooldown.
adminDashboard.sendTemplateDialogDesc_other: {{count}} users selected. Sending is recorded in the marketing log and counts toward these users' 48h cooldown.
adminDashboard.usersWithoutOptInSkipped_one: {{count}} user without newsletter opt-in is skipped by default.
adminDashboard.usersWithoutOptInSkipped_other: {{count}} users without newsletter opt-in are skipped by default.
adminDashboard.usersWithoutEmailSkipped_one: {{count}} user without an email is skipped.
adminDashboard.usersWithoutEmailSkipped_other: {{count}} users without an email are skipped.
adminDashboard.noTemplatesHint: No templates created yet. Create one under <marketingLink>Admin › Marketing</marketingLink>.
adminDashboard.ignoreCooldownHint: Sends even if the user has recently received a marketing email.
adminDashboard.ignoreOptInHint: For transactional/urgent messages only. Marketing without consent is not permitted.
adminDashboard.subject: Subject
adminDashboard.audioLoadError: Audio files could not be loaded.

adminEvaluation.dataSourceHintEvalDocs: Manually created ground-truth texts are used as the reference.

adminInvoices.title: Invoices
adminInvoices.searchPlaceholder: Search by invoice no., name, email...
adminInvoices.deleteDialogBodySuffix: will be permanently removed (database record and PDF).
adminInvoices.markOrderPrefix: Mark the associated payment order (#{{orderId}}) as
adminInvoices.markOrderNote: Prevents the invoice from being automatically recreated the next time the settings are opened. Recommended for test purchases.
adminInvoices.noOrderNote: No associated payment order – only the invoice will be deleted.
adminInvoices.errorLoadInvoice: The invoice could not be loaded.

adminMarketing.pageSubtitle: Create templates, filter segments, send campaigns and manage funnel automation.
adminMarketing.templatesEmpty: No templates yet. Create your first one now.
adminMarketing.templateEditorDesc: HTML body with placeholders. A footer with an unsubscribe link is appended automatically.
adminMarketing.placeholderPreheader: Short text shown in the inbox next to the subject
adminMarketing.placeholderTextFallback: Leave empty to generate it automatically from the HTML.
adminMarketing.testmailHint: Note: save changes in the editor first so they are included in the test email. Test emails bypass opt-in and cooldown.
adminMarketing.registeredAtLeastDays: Registered at least N days ago
adminMarketing.registeredAtMostDays: Registered at most N days ago
adminMarketing.segmentOptInHint: Newsletter opt-in is always required. The 48h cooldown applies when sending.
adminMarketing.campaignSendWarning: Sending starts immediately after you click “Send” in the campaign list. Users who already received a marketing email in the last 48 h are skipped automatically.
adminMarketing.broadcastDialogDesc: Sends an existing app template as a Resend marketing broadcast to your segment. The newsletter footer automatically uses Resend's unsubscribe link.
adminMarketing.segmentIdHint: Not the segment name, but the UUID from Resend. Leave empty if RESEND_MARKETING_SEGMENT_ID is set.
adminMarketing.sendNowHint: If disabled, only a draft is created in Resend.
adminMarketing.placeholderMappingPrefix: App placeholders are translated for Resend:
adminMarketing.flowsHint: Funnels automatically check every 15 minutes whether users reach a step.
adminMarketing.toastSchedulerStartedDesc: Due emails are sent in the background.
adminMarketing.noStepsAddHint: No steps. Edit to add some.
adminMarketing.flowEditorDesc: Trigger + time-staggered steps. Each step is sent at most once per user.
adminMarketing.logDesc: All test, campaign and funnel emails in chronological order.

adminMessages.emptyNone: There are no support requests yet.
adminMessages.selectConversation: Select a conversation to read and reply to it.
adminMessages.toastReplyFailed: The reply could not be sent.

adminOrders.selectOrderHint: Select an order to see details

adminSettings.modelCardDesc: The model set here is used for all new transcriptions in the production environment.
adminSettings.geminiWarning: Gemini models have not yet been tested sufficiently. Make sure the evaluation shows satisfactory results before switching to Gemini.
adminSettings.fallbackCardDesc: Used automatically when the primary model is overloaded (HTTP 429/503/529). Recommended: a faster or alternative model from a different provider.
adminSettings.fallbackIdenticalWarning: The fallback and primary model are identical. Choose a different model or provider so the fallback is meaningful.
adminSettings.promotionCardDesc: Enable a campaign and set the discount in percent per package. Prices on the website and in Stripe are adjusted automatically.
adminSettings.exampleCardDesc: Select completed transcription jobs to show on the public examples page. Visitors can view these documents without signing in.
adminSettings.allJobsAdded: All completed jobs have already been added as examples.
adminSettings.manualJobIdPlaceholder: Or enter a job ID manually...
adminSettings.noJobsFound: No completed transcription jobs found. Enter a job ID manually above.
adminSettings.toastFallbackSaveError: Fallback settings could not be saved.
adminSettings.toastPromotionSaved: The discount campaign has been updated.
adminSettings.toastPromotionSaveError: Discount settings could not be saved.
adminSettings.toastExampleSaveError: Example configuration could not be saved.
adminSettings.toastAudioGeneratedBody: TTS audio has been created. Save to apply it.

adminTokens.pageSubtitle: API costs and token usage per user
adminTokens.emptyBody: Token data is only recorded from now on for new transcriptions.

ctaab.placeholderSnippet:
Frankfurt, July 22, 1925

Dear Mother,

at last I find the time to write to you at length. The journey was long and arduous, yet here in the new apartment I already feel at home. The landlady is a warm-hearted woman, and the view from the window looks straight out onto the old market square with its fountain…
ctaab.originalHeadline: Get it transcribed for free now
ctaab.originalDescriptionPre: Our AI turns your handwriting into readable text. A short sign-up is required – you get

ctaab.progressOneClick: Just one click away from the full text.

ctaab.benefitDescriptionRest: {{label}} script – your result is just one click away.
ctaab.personalizedHighDescriptionMid: ) our AI delivers especially precise results. Start now –
